title: Capability docs drift from reality — ABOUT.md marks everything working while P2 coherence bugs are open
what_failed: ABOUT.md's capability table marks every row '✅ Working' — including 'Cross-mode continuity', 'Three-tier memory', and the full tool loop — while open tickets T-141/T-142/T-143 say the core conversation is incoherent, has no session isolation, and contradicts itself. The marketing surface and the ticket queue describe two different products. doc_drift_watcher checks for stale docs but has no notion of 'capability claimed working vs open P2 bug against that capability'.
where_failed: ABOUT.md:33-52 (all-green capability table), README.md status lines, no reconciliation in doc_drift_watcher.py
why_likely: ABOUT.md is hand-curated and aspirational; the ticket queue is the truth. Nothing forces them to agree, so the doc rots toward optimism with every feature added and never gets marked down when something breaks.
migration_plan: 1. Replace the binary ✅ column in ABOUT.md with three states: Working / Flaky / Broken.
2. Mark any capability that has an open P1/P2 ticket against its component as Flaky or Broken, with the ticket id inline.
3. Extend doc_drift_watcher.py: for each capability row, map to a component; if an open P1/P2 ticket names that component, flag a WARN when the row still says Working.
4. Run it in /pi-passive so the drift surfaces before any commit that touches docs.
implementation_notes: Honesty is the cheaper long-term position, especially for a portfolio repo. A status table that admits 'Flaky — see T-143' reads as more credible engineering than a wall of green that the open tickets contradict.
analysis: PERSPECTIVE: For a project whose stated purpose is 'the most honest thing I can show about how I think,' an all-green capability table that your own tickets contradict is the one thing that undercuts the whole pitch. Anyone senior reads the gap immediately. Make the docs tell the truth automatically — tie them to the ticket queue so they can't drift back to optimism.
progress: 2026-05-29: docs made honest - ABOUT.md legend (Working/Partial/Known-issue) + reality rows; public README recipe-free + honest. REMAINING (optional): automate capability-vs-open-ticket drift in doc_drift_watcher.py.
